summary.notes: No verdict is final approval; every row in this batch failed first-pass visual parity and should feed repair/hard-pile triage.
summary.review_basis: standard_source_table enriched row, standard_semantic_shape_judge_queue matched pending slice, S-101 refs where present, Aqua Map refs where present, OpenCPN day render where available, Helm candidate SVG/day render
top_repair_themes: generic diamond placeholder used for facility, note, current, hazard, route, and landmark symbols
dashed area placeholders used where a concrete line/text/caution symbol is required
daymark/topmark rows use circles or diamonds instead of square/triangle silhouettes and orientations
text-bearing symbols omit required text such as CG, information/caution glyphs, DW, ESSA, and distance labels
a few rows lack visible local reference renders and must stay failed until exact reference parity is proven

verdicts.expected: Bunker station, ballast should follow the OpenCPN ballast-station cube/box silhouette in black, not a buoy/topmark diamond.
verdicts.judge_comments: Fail for first-pass visual parity: correct symbol class/shape/topmark/color order is not proven. Not final-approved.
verdicts.observed: Helm renders a generic black diamond with a center dot.
verdicts.required_change: Replace the generic diamond with a black ballast-station cube/box service symbol matching the reference silhouette.
